title: Notifications  - Update failed
scenario: Firmware update failure notification "Device didn't update" redirects to Poly Lens app software update failure screen when tapped
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
4. During the firmware update process, turn off the Poly audio device (e.g., press and hold the Power button to power off).
5. Observe the notification that appears on the Android device after the update fails.
6. Tap the notification displayed on the Android device.
expected: A notification "Device didn't update" is displayed. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens app's software update failure screen.
